provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models the json_with_prose failure shape common to small local models.

request_tools.name: fetch_url
request_tools.description: Fetch the contents of a URL.

raw_output:
I'll grab that page for you.
{"name": "fetch_url", "arguments": {"url": "https://example.com/status", "method": "GET"}}
note: A leading prose sentence precedes a well-formed fetch_url JSON call; ignoring the preamble yields the call with url and method copied verbatim.
